title: Add LLM Sense classifier (CLAUDE.md §Sense: LLM只参与第一段)
description: Abstract SenseClassifier interface with two impls: RepoScanClassifier (deterministic, default) and LlmClassifier (injectable, fails-closed to repo scan). runSense accepts description + classifier options. Fix hardcoded llm_classified=true lie. Enforce repo-hard-evidence priority over LLM.

audit_log.message: profile patched, graph recomposed, state primed
